violations.text: Laminate lining near handsink at front service line was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. Active maintenance on walk-in cooler was being done during time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floors in the food prep area/ warewashing area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbant, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2023

The walk-in freezer floors (especially under speed racks) have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw beef were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as cheeses in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was actively being cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

-Potato salad was observed held at 44-47 degrees Fahrenheit in deli display case (ambient of refrigeration unit was observed between 40-45 degrees Fahrenheit) -Oatmilk was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit (ambient of 1 door lowboy was observed at 43 degrees Fahrenheit).Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were out of temperature for an unknown amount of time were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Chili (5/7) and Veg Chili were (5/9) observed held in 2 door refrigerator past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

-Gaskets at 2 door cooler in kitchen were observed in poor repair. -Gaskets at 1 door lowboy at coffee station was observed in poor repair. 1 door lowboy was observed at an ambient of 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment was taken out of service to hold TCS foods. -Laminate lining near handsink at front service line was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025
Portafilter handle for espresso machine was observed held by tape. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The condensate from the walk-in cooler refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floors in the food prep area/ warewashing area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbant, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2023

The walk-in freezer floors (especially under speed racks) have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
Shepard's pie and soups were observed held past 7 days. Foods were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

The presence of rodents and small flies is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings and live insects observed during time of inspection. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

Water from walk-in cooler evaporator fan was observed stagnant in bin of food. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Active maintenance was performed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at the 1 door lowboy observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2023

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: 1. kitchen hood vents 2. floors underneath and beneath cookline equipment The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024
The following is in poor repair: 1. garage door seal 2. storage room wall The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The floors in the food prep area/ warewashing area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbant, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2023
